questions: What is the primary task on this surface in the first 30 seconds?
What content or code must stay?
What is the main CTA and what is the lower-risk secondary path?
What states already exist and which are missing?
What accessibility or performance constraints are explicit?
low_risk_assumptions: The surface should work on both desktop and mobile web unless stated otherwise.
Interactive controls need visible focus and disabled states.
A landing page needs proof before a late-scroll CTA asks for commitment.
A dashboard needs a visible default filter or time range.
